name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ N > 0
          /\ state \in StateSpace
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = idle

(* Next action *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = \*]
          /\ turn' = \*  \* turn may change or stay the same

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished
\* All processes are numbered 1..N
\* All channels are pairs (i,j) where i and j are process numbers
\* The set of all channels is Channels == { (i,j) \in N \X N : i \in N /\ j \in N /\ i # j }

Channels == { (i,j) \in N \X N : i \in N /\ j \in N /\ i # j }

\* Initial state: all processes have initial local state 0, all channels are empty,
\* no markers sent or received, and no process has finished recording
Init == /\ state = [i \in N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ snapshot = [i \in N |-> [localState \in N, channelState \in [Channels \X N |-> N]]]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = [i \in N |-> FALSE]

\* Next action: either send a marker on an outgoing channel or receive a message
Next == 
  \E i \in N : 
    /\ state[i] = state[i] + 1
    /\ channel = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Append(channeli..j, state[i])]
  \/ \E i \in N : \E j \in N : i # j /\ markerSenti..j = FALSE
    /\ finished[i] = FALSE
    /\ state[i] = state[i] + 1
    /\ channel = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Append(channeli..j, state[i])]
    /\ markerSent = [markerSent EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
  \/ \E i \in N : \E j \in N : i # j /\ markerReceivedi..j = FALSE
    /\ finished[i] = FALSE
    /\ channeli..j \in N
    /\ channel = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Tail(channeli..j)]
    /\ markerReceived = [markerReceived EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
  \/ \E i \in N : 
    /\ finished[i] = FALSE
    /\ \A j \in N : j # i /\ markerReceivedi..j = TRUE
    /\ finished = [finished EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ snapshot = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = [localState \in state[i], channelState \in [Channels \X N |-> N] : 
          /\ c \in Channels
          /\ c[2] = i
          /\ channelState[c] = channel[c] ]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>

\* Type invariants
TypeOK == /\ state \in [N |-> N]
          /\ channel \in [Channels |-> Seq(N)]
          /\ snapshot \in [N |-> [localState \in N, channelState \in [Channels \X N |-> N]]]
          /\ markerSent \in [Channels |-> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerReceived \in [Channels |-> BOOLEAN]
          /\ finished \in [N |-> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF lastChunk \in sentChunks THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE 0
    /\ channelState' = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF i = lastChunk THEN 1 ELSE channelState[i]]
    /\ lastChunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ lastChunk \notin sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES data, snapshot, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, status, commitLog, abortLog, txnId, nextTxnId, readOnly, writeOnly, readOnlyTxn, writeOnlyTxn, readOnlyTxnId, writeOnlyTxnId, readOnlySnapshot, writeOnlySnapshot, readOnlyReadSet, writeOnlyReadSet, writeOnlyWriteSet, writeOnlyWriteVals, readOnlyStatus, writeOnlyStatus

Init == /\ data = <<>>
       /\ snapshot = <<>>
       /\ readSet = <<>>
       /\ writeSet = <<>>
       /\ writeVals = <<>>
       /\ status = <<>>
       /\ commitLog = <<>>
       /\ abortLog = <<>>
       /\ txnId = 0
       /\ nextTxnId = 1
       /\ readOnly = <<>>
       /\ writeOnly = <<>>
       /\ readOnlyTxn = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyTxn = <<>>
       /\ readOnlyTxnId = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyTxnId = <<>>
       /\ readOnlySnapshot = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlySnapshot = <<>>
       /\ readOnlyReadSet = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyReadSet = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyWriteSet = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyWriteVals = <<>>
       /\ readOnlyStatus = <<>>
       /\ writeOnlyStatus = <<>>

Next == /\ data' = data
       /\ snapshot' = snapshot
       /\ readSet' = readSet
       /\ writeSet' = writeSet
       /\ writeVals' = writeVals
       /\ status' = status
       /\ commitLog' = commitLog
       /\ abortLog' = abortLog
       /\ txnId' = txnId
       /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId
       /\ readOnly' = readOnly
       /\ writeOnly' = writeOnly
       /\ readOnlyTxn' = readOnlyTxn
       /\ writeOnlyTxn' = writeOnlyTxn
       /\ readOnlyTxnId' = readOnlyTxnId
       /\ writeOnlyTxnId' = writeOnlyTxnId
       /\ readOnlySnapshot' = readOnlySnapshot
       /\ writeOnlySnapshot' = writeOnlySnapshot
       /\ readOnlyReadSet' = readOnlyReadSet
       /\ writeOnlyReadSet' = writeOnlyReadSet
       /\ writeOnlyWriteSet' = writeOnlyWriteSet
       /\ writeOnlyWriteVals' = writeOnlyWriteVals
       /\ readOnlyStatus' = readOnlyStatus
       /\ writeOnlyStatus' = writeOnlyStatus

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, snapshot, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, status, commitLog, abortLog, txnId, nextTxnId, readOnly, writeOnly, readOnlyTxn, writeOnlyTxn, readOnlyTxnId, writeOnlyTxnId, readOnlySnapshot, writeOnlySnapshot, readOnlyReadSet, writeOnlyReadSet, writeOnlyWriteSet, writeOnlyWriteVals, readOnlyStatus, writeOnlyStatus>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
        /\ \/ /\ turn = 0
            /\ wants[0] = FALSE
            /\ wants' = <<TRUE, wants[1]>>
        \/ /\ turn = 1
            /\ wants[1] = FALSE
            /\ wants' = <<wants[0], TRUE>>
        \/ /\ turn = 0
            /\ wants[0] = TRUE
            /\ wants[1] = FALSE
            /\ turn' = 1
            /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ turn = 1
            /\ wants[0] = FALSE
            /\ wants[1] = TRUE
            /\ turn' = 0
            /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
